title: salvia subglabra
intro: Salvia subglabra, also known as Argentine sage, is a perennial herb belonging to the sage family (Lamiaceae) that is native to South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Salvia subglabra include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Salvia subglabra can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
